mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT_BOARD WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND TARGET_NO = #{targetNo} AND BOARD_TYPE = #{boardType} AND DELETED = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT_BOARD SET UPDATED = 'Y' WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo} AND UPDATED = 'N'
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT PROOF_NO AS TARGET_NO FROM PROOF_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT JOIN_NO AS TARGET_NO FROM JOIN_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N'
UNION ALL
SELECT BOARD_NO AS TARGET_NO FROM REVIEW_BOARD WHERE DELETED = 'N' ) WHERE TARGET_NO = #{targetNo}
